prompt_improvements.improvement: Require the implementor prompt to collect and record concrete staging evidence values (run_date_utc, blob URI/ETag, required player names, failed-path check, App Insights query results, metric datapoint, duration) in the sign-off artifact.
Require the prompt to verify staging credentials/environment variables up front and explicitly branch into 'execute validation' vs 'prepare checklist only' behavior.
Require a one-to-one mapping table from each acceptance criterion to either automated test coverage or manual validation command/query text.
Require explicit disposition for every code review finding with one of: addressed, not_addressed (with blocker), or not_applicable.
